response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software development with a strong background in C++ (including Windows development) and other languages, but his recent work (2021–2025) has been primarily in TypeScript, JavaScript, Node.js, and Dlang. There is no evidence of recent SQL Server/Oracle experience or fixed-income/capital markets domain expertise. His lack of recent C++ work on Windows platforms and absence of financial-sector experience significantly reduces his fit for this role.
strengths: Strong C++ experience with Windows platform (earlier in career)
Senior-level experience with diverse tech stacks
concerns: No recent C++/Windows development (shifted to TypeScript/JS/Dlang since 2021)
Lacks SQL Server/Oracle and fixed-income/capital markets domain experience
No evidence of Summit platform, STL, or financial-sector tools
